item.title: How to nail job interviews.
item.description: Stage 1: Introduction Requirements: Have faith in yourself. Remember that all parties involved, are mere human beings. Ensure you know what the client’s needs are (as far as possible), and what their occupation is. Things to share: Your name Family status Place of residence Your hobbies Goal: try to find common ground. Stage 2: Questionnaire Requirements: Have a clear image of what drives you / you want to achieve (in general).
